prompt: What looks visually broken on this page?

reportedIssues.description: The navigation tab text 'Hot Gamm' appears truncated - it should likely read 'Hot Games' but the final letters are cut off
reportedIssues.suggestion: Ensure the tab container has sufficient width to display the full text, or implement proper text wrapping/ellipsis handling with a tooltip showing the complete text

cells.summary: Found 1 issue: a minor text truncation in the navigation menu.

expected.reasoning: The reported issue describes truncated text in a navigation tab ('Hot Gamm' instead of 'Hot Games'), which is a different element and different misspelling than 'Jacpots' vs 'Jackpots'.

reportedIssues.description: Game tile titles are being truncated and cut off in both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections. Examples include 'MAGNI...' (should be full game name), 'Hyperc...' (partially visible), and 'Dark...' (partially visible). This prevents users from reading complete game names.
reportedIssues.suggestion: Ensure game tile containers have proper text overflow handling. Either expand tile height to fit multi-line text, implement text wrapping, or use CSS ellipsis with full title in a tooltip on hover.

reportedIssues.description: The 'Hot Game' navigation item in the top menu bar is truncated and displays as 'Hot Gam'.
reportedIssues.suggestion: Adjust the navigation item width or reduce padding/font size to accommodate the full text, or implement text wrapping for menu items on smaller viewports.

cells.summary: Found 2 issues: major text truncation in game tiles affecting usability, and minor header navigation text cutoff.

reportedIssues.suggestion: Adjust the horizontal scroll or overflow settings to ensure all game cards are fully visible, or use a carousel with proper padding to prevent edge clipping
